_note: Auto-managed by Claude. Never edit manually. Claude populates this as flows are designed and frames are created via Figma MCP.

pages.Flows: All user flow screens — primary working page
pages.Components: Component library — read once per hi-fi session, never during design
pages.Tokens: Token definitions — never access via MCP
pages.Archive: Deprecated designs — never access via MCP

flows._note: Claude adds flow entries here as they are designed. Format shown below.

frames.label: screen label
frames.node_id: Figma node ID — populated after frame creation
